## 1. What are cookies and similar technologies

Cookies are small text files that visited websites send to the user's browser, where they are stored to be retransmitted to the same sites on subsequent visits. In addition to cookies, the site may use similar technologies such as browser **local storage** to store non-sensitive preferences.

## 2. Consent categories

The site uses a consent banner that allows you to accept, reject, or customize preferences by category. Below are the categories and services actually used.

| Category  | Service / Technology            | Type      | Purpose                         | Duration                              |
| --------- | ------------------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| Necessary | `i18n_redirected` (cookie)      | Technical | Stores language preference      | 1 year                                |
| Analytics | Umami (self-hosted, cookieless) | Analytics | Anonymous navigation statistics | No cookie — active only after consent |

### Necessary cookies

| Cookie            | Type      | Purpose                    | Duration |
| ----------------- | --------- | -------------------------- | -------- |
| `i18n_redirected` | Technical | Stores language preference | 1 year   |

These cookies are essential for the site to function and do not require consent.

### Analytics cookies (with consent)

| Service                       | Type                  | Purpose                                                           | Cookies |
| ----------------------------- | --------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| Umami Analytics (self-hosted) | Analytics, cookieless | Anonymous navigation statistics (pages visited, referrer, device) | None    |

Umami is loaded **only after explicit consent** via the banner. It does not use profiling cookies or personal identifiers.

## 3. Consent preference storage

Choices made via the banner are saved in browser **local storage** under the key `acme_cookie_consent`. The record includes:

- consent policy version
- category preferences (necessary always on, analytics optional)
- decision date and expiry (12 months)

Upon expiry or policy update, the banner will be shown again.

## 4. Managing preferences

Users can at any time:

- change preferences via the consent banner (on first visit or after expiry)
- consult this Cookie Policy
- manage cookies and storage via browser settings

Disabling technical cookies may impair some site functionality (e.g. language preference).

## 5. Contact

For cookie and data processing information: hello@example.com
